pickup.name: Oil Vial
pickup.effect: Coats enemies in flammable liquid, increasing fire damage taken

encounters.trigger: Opening the main crypt door draws the attention of the first guardian

enemy.name: Damp Shadow Lurker
enemy.weakness: Oil Vial application combined with fire

encounters.hazard: Falling water droplets that extinguish small flames

pickup.name: Obsidian Mirror Shard
pickup.effect: Reflects magical projectiles

encounters.trigger: Clearing the foyer unlocks the inner sealed passage to the hall

pickup.name: Sun-Touched Keystone
pickup.effect: Stripped of its outer layer, it pulses with intense solar energy

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Lurker causes the floor in the hall to collapse, dropping the player into the chamber

boss.name: The Void-Lord of Gloom
boss.victory_condition: Using the Sun-Touched Keystone to disperse the Void-Lord's shadow shield before dealing fatal damage

level.objective: Purify the crypt by destroying the Void-Lord to stop the spreading corruption

pickup.name: Bag of Glittery Acorns
pickup.effect: Temporarily pacifies woodland creatures

encounters.trigger: Defeating the squirrel causes a path of flowers to bloom leading to the next area

encounters.hazard: Spore clouds causing harmless giggling fits

pickup.name: Glowing Moon-Dew Vial
pickup.effect: Reveals hidden spirits and illusions

encounters.trigger: Soothing the badger clears the fog blocking the cave entrance to the boss arena

encounters.hazard: Floating rocks that gently boop the player

pickup.name: Ancient Sun-Shard Charm
pickup.effect: Massively boosts pet companion speed

encounters.trigger: Clearing the pixies awakens the Guardian Spirit for the boss battle

boss.name: The Sleepy Stone Giant
boss.victory_condition: Use the Charm to wake the giant and convince him to move aside peacefully

level.objective: Navigate the Giggling Grove and clear the path to the Sun Temple

pickup.name: Vial of Holy Oil
pickup.effect: Coats weapon for massive damage against undead

encounters.trigger: Opening the iron sarcophagus releases the Thrall and drops the key to the Inner Gate

pickup.name: Orb of Radiance
pickup.effect: Emits blinding light that stuns darkness-aligned creatures

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Knight clears the blockage to the Sealed Sanctum where the ritual is taking place

pickup.name: Cursed Obsidian Shard
pickup.effect: Breaks magical barriers when struck

encounters.trigger: Destroying the Sentinel activates the altar that summons the final Boss

boss.name: Malachai, the Void-Touched
boss.victory_condition: Shatter the void-shield with the Cursed Obsidian Shard then deliver a final strike

level.objective: Cleanse the Whispering Catacombs and defeat Malachai to stop the void ritual.
level.reward: Blade of the Dawn and 5000 Gold Pieces.

level.setting: The Whispering Archives, a library floating in a void of fractured reality

encounters.hazard: Shifting floor tiles that drop the player into darkness

pickup.name: Bottled Moonlight
pickup.effect: Reveals hidden passages and grants night vision

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Echo-Stalker unlocks the warded seal to the Archive of Mirrors

encounters.hazard: Reflective surfaces that copy the player's movement and attack with delay

pickup.name: Tome of Inversion
pickup.effect: Reverses the polarity of magical spells

encounters.trigger: Shattering the Mirror-Bound Construct creates a resonance frequency needed to unlock the Sanctum entrance

encounters.hazard: Suffocating ink pools that drain health over time

pickup.name: Fragment of the Origin Mirror
pickup.effect: Absorbs incoming reality-warping attacks

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Sentinel causes the ink to solidify into a bridge leading to the boss

boss.name: The Librarian of Fractures
boss.victory_condition: Use the Fragment of the Origin Mirror to reflect the boss's ultimate reality-collapse spell back at them

level.objective: Retrieve the Forbidden Codex before the archive collapses into the void

level.setting: The Whispering Glade, a peaceful, moss-covered ancient forest bathed in golden twilight.

pickup.name: Sun-Kissed Dewdrop
pickup.effect: Restores 20 health and illuminates dark paths.

encounters.trigger: Approaching the statue of the old guardian

pickup.name: Silver Leaf Pendant
pickup.effect: A protective charm that softens the blow of heavy attacks.

encounters.trigger: Crossing the bridge causes the golem to awaken

pickup.name: Star-Dust Phial
pickup.effect: A glowing reagent required to cleanse the corrupted heart of the forest.

encounters.trigger: Picking up the phial calls forth the final guardian

boss.name: The Sleeping Dryad
boss.victory_condition: Purify the Dryad by using the Star-Dust Phial to break the corruption cycle.

level.objective: Restore peace to the Whispering Glade by purifying the corrupted dryad.
level.reward: The Staff of Eternal Spring and the Warden's Blessing.

level.setting: The Maelstrom Citadel, a floating fortress crumbling into a vortex

pickup.name: Bottle of Liquid Gravity
pickup.effect: Temporarily anchors objects to the ground

encounters.trigger: Defeating the guard causes the ceiling to collapse, revealing the path to the inner sanctum.

encounters.hazard: Rapid gravity shifts that throw the player against walls

pickup.name: Essence of the Ancient Flame
pickup.effect: Ignites non-magical weapons for massive burning damage

encounters.trigger: Slaying the mage creates a gravitational singularity that teleports the player directly to the Boss's arena.

pickup.name: Heart of the Citadel
pickup.effect: Vulnerability generator

encounters.trigger: Killing the Behemoth shatters the core, forcing the Boss to emerge from the wreckage.

boss.name: Arch-Chaos Lord Malakor
boss.victory_condition: Expose the Boss to the Heart of the Citadel to remove his invulnerability shield, then strike with the empowered Blood-Axe.

level.objective: Destroy the vortex at the heart of the Maelstrom Citadel before the reality it consumes collapses entirely.

pickup.name: Vial of Soul-Essence
pickup.effect: Temporarily grants necrotic chill to attacks

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Spirit causes the sealed stone door to the Crypt of Sighs to groan open

pickup.name: Sun-Bleached Amulet
pickup.effect: Emits a faint holy radiance that burns shadow-bound entities

encounters.trigger: Slaying the Gravewarden shatters the magical wards protecting the inner sanctum stairs

pickup.name: Obsidian Key
pickup.effect: Unlocks the Forbidden Ossuary where the boss resides

encounters.trigger: Destroying the Shadow Construct reveals the key required to enter the Ossuary

boss.name: Lich Lord Valthor
boss.victory_condition: Reduce boss health to zero while the amulet aura is active

level.objective: Purify the corrupt necromantic energy poisoning the Catacombs

level.setting: The Whispering Wastes, a desolate gray tundra littered with the bones of ancient giants

encounters.hazard: Perpetual blizzard that drains health over time

pickup.name: Ember-Core Heart
pickup.effect: Provides heat to melt frozen barriers

encounters.trigger: The death of the ghoul shatters the ice wall blocking the path to the Ashen Catacombs

pickup.name: Blessed Bone Arrowhead
pickup.effect: Pierces spiritual armor

encounters.trigger: Defeating the sentinel opens the stone sarcophagus containing the final ritual key

encounters.hazard: Gravity wells that pull the player toward the edge

pickup.name: Void-Sight Lens
pickup.effect: Reveals the true form of the Ancient King

encounters.trigger: Cleansing the specter allows the barrier to the throne room to dissolve

boss.name: The Ancient King of Dust
boss.victory_condition: Use the Void-Sight Lens to spot his physical tether and strike it with the Obsidian Longbow

level.objective: Traverse the wastes and end the curse of the Ancient King

pickup.name: Cryo-Coolant Canister
pickup.effect: Temporarily freezes organic biological matter

encounters.trigger: Deactivating the ventilation system triggers the drone's wake-up sequence.

pickup.name: Mag-Lock Override Key
pickup.effect: Disables magnetic shielding on high-security doors

encounters.trigger: Opening the bay door with the override key alerts the bot.

enemy.name: Station Overlord Unit
enemy.weakness: Mag-Lock Override Key (used to short-circuit internal hydraulics)

pickup.name: Experimental Neural Uplink
pickup.effect: Allows control over boss-level subsystems

encounters.trigger: Using the override key unlocks the reactor shield and initiates the boss battle.

boss.name: Void-Engine Sentience
boss.victory_condition: Hack the boss's central node using the Neural Uplink to shut down the reactor

level.objective: Escape the station before the unstable reactor causes a total system collapse.
level.reward: Refinery Station Access Codes and salvaged ship upgrades.

level.setting: A crumbling, time-dilated research station orbiting a dying star.

pickup.name: Chronal Stabilizer
pickup.effect: Allows player to phase through temporal rifts

encounters.trigger: Deactivating the airlock console activates the security drone in the next sector

pickup.name: Singularity Core
pickup.effect: Increases weapon fire rate by 50%

encounters.trigger: Opening the main lab door attracts the boss from the reactor core

pickup.name: Temporal Anchor
pickup.effect: Grants infinite stamina

encounters.trigger: Inserting the Temporal Anchor into the machine unlocks the final boss fight

boss.name: Chronos Overlord
boss.victory_condition: Anchor the boss in the present timeline before the station collapses

level.objective: Escape the station while neutralizing the timeline corruption.

pickup.name: Superconductive Coolant Canister
pickup.effect: Reduces weapon overheat penalty by 50%

encounters.trigger: Debris impact causes a cascade failure, opening the bulkhead to the Reactor Core

pickup.name: High-Density Ion Battery
pickup.effect: Empowers Stormcaller abilities for one-hit kills on minor threats

encounters.trigger: Sentinel death detonates the core, forcing an emergency lockdown exit into the Hangar

pickup.name: Emergency Override Keycard
pickup.effect: Disables boss shield generators

encounters.trigger: Commando death signals the docking of the Hive Mothership

boss.name: Titan-Class Cybernetic Overlord
boss.victory_condition: Disable shields using the keycard, then overload the boss core with the Thunder-Core Railgun

level.objective: Escape the station while neutralizing the Hive Mothership docking attempt.
level.reward: Stormcaller's Ascension Armor Set and 50,000 Credits

level.setting: A decaying, silent space station drifting in the void of a nebula

enemy.name: Malfunctioning Maintenance Drone
enemy.weakness: Direct impact from Arcane Plasma Caster

pickup.name: Cryo-Coolant Canister
pickup.effect: Temporarily freezes enemy circuitry

encounters.trigger: Approaching the sealed airlock to the Bio-Lab

pickup.name: Resonance Frequency Module
pickup.effect: Unlocks encrypted blast doors

encounters.trigger: Entering the code into the main reactor console

pickup.name: Station Master Override Key
pickup.effect: Allows control over boss environmental hazards

encounters.trigger: The reactor goes critical, opening the path to the Boss Chamber

boss.name: Station Overseer AI
boss.victory_condition: Use the Override Key to force a system reboot

level.objective: Investigate the silence of the research station and restore power to the communication array.
level.reward: Prototype Artifact Blueprint and Station Navigation Data

pickup.name: Thermal Cloak Module
pickup.effect: Temporarily hides thermal signature

encounters.trigger: Destroying the sentry shorts out the security door lock for the maintenance tunnels

pickup.name: Neuro-Toxin Injector
pickup.effect: Stuns bio-mechanical targets

encounters.trigger: Defeating the construct forces the central AI to reboot and open the ventilation shaft to the bridge

pickup.name: Override Keycard
pickup.effect: Disables boss's shielding system

encounters.trigger: Securing the keycard triggers the final quarantine seal to drop, granting access to the bridge

boss.name: Void Warden
boss.victory_condition: Disable shields with Keycard then strike critical core

level.objective: Retrieve the station's navigation data and purge the AI core
level.reward: Prototype cloaking field generator and 5000 credits

pickup.name: Thermal Catalyst Serum
pickup.effect: Increases damage against cold-sensitive biological targets

encounters.trigger: Opening the airlock releases a containment beacon, signaling the next wave

pickup.name: Volatile Neuro-Toxin
pickup.effect: Paralyzes synthetic central nervous systems

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Stalker triggers a silent alarm that awakens the central core

pickup.name: Ancient Override Keycard
pickup.effect: Unlocks the main Bio-Reactor core

encounters.trigger: Using the Keycard opens the heavy Blast Doors to the boss chamber

boss.name: The Bio-Reactor Sentinel
boss.weakness: Ancient Override Keycard (used to bypass shield shielding)
boss.victory_condition: Disable the Sentinel's power source using the override keycard before the final phase

level.objective: Purge the sentient bio-growth from the station core

encounters.hazard: Zero-gravity patches that make movement slippery.

pickup.name: Stardust Spray
pickup.effect: Temporarily blinds enemies and makes them giggle uncontrollably.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Glitter-Bot activates the holographic door to the Jam-Filled Corridors.

encounters.hazard: Sticky marmalade spills that slow down movement.

pickup.name: Glow-In-The-Dark Wrench
pickup.effect: Allows the player to dismantle machinery with a cheerful beep.

encounters.trigger: Using the Stardust Spray on the spider opens the maintenance hatch to the Main Cooling Vents.

encounters.hazard: Strong gusts of air that push the player backwards.

pickup.name: Polished Memory Chip
pickup.effect: Contains the override code for the station's central core.

encounters.trigger: Repairing the fan with the Wrench unlocks the elevator to the Control Deck.

boss.name: The Sentient Pastry Chef AI
boss.victory_condition: Insert the memory chip into the central console to reboot the AI to a friendlier setting.

level.objective: Stop the space station from turning into a giant confectionary factory.
level.reward: The title of 'Galactic Baker' and a lifetime supply of sugar-free space treats.

level.setting: An abandoned, terraformed moon orbiting a nebula, filled with floating monolithic structures and meditation ponds.

enemy.name: Floating Surveillance Orb
enemy.weakness: Physical shatter impact from the Crystalline Seismic Hammer

pickup.name: Gravitational Anchor Shard
pickup.effect: Stabilizes nearby tectonic energy for stronger strikes

encounters.trigger: Destroying the orb deactivates the gravitational locks on the bridge to the next area.

enemy.name: Crystalized Security Construct
enemy.weakness: Overloading its core with the Gravitational Anchor Shard

encounters.hazard: High-frequency sonic pulses that drain stamina

pickup.name: Sonic Resonator Tuning Fork
pickup.effect: Vibrates through synthetic armor

encounters.trigger: Defeating the construct shatters the seal on the inner sanctum.

enemy.name: Phase-shifting Automaton
enemy.weakness: Frequency matching via the Sonic Resonator Tuning Fork

encounters.hazard: Unstable light bridges that vanish upon stepping

pickup.name: Prime Geo-Core
pickup.effect: Allows mastery over the ancient terraforming machine

encounters.trigger: Killing the automaton initiates the alignment of the final gate to the boss chamber.

boss.name: The Architect of Silence
boss.weakness: Harmonic feedback caused by the Prime Geo-Core
boss.victory_condition: Channel the Prime Geo-Core into the room's central console while surviving the Architect's onslaught.

level.objective: Restore the terraforming engine to bring life back to the dead moon.
level.reward: The ability to reshape planetary landscapes at will.
